lessons.title: Query the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Author queries for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL using the SQL query language.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/query-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Query the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Author complex queries with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Create SQL queries for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL that uses subqueries or cross-products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/author-complex-queries-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Author complex queries with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Build Generative AI applications with Azure Cosmos DB
lessons.content_md:
Build advanced Generative AI application with Python and Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/build-generative-ai-applications-with-azure-cosmos-db-nosql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build Generative AI applications with Azure Cosmos DB

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Execute queries and build a Generative AI application with Azure Cosmos DB
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Execute queries and build a Generative AI application with Azure Cosmos DB**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
